cases.name: rental_overview_chat
cases.reply_preview:
On these facts, the issue is mainly property or tenancy issue.
In practice, this usually turns on possession, the written or oral tenancy/title record, payment trail, and communication around notice, deposit, or possession.
Relevant context: Rental and tenancy questions usually turn on possession, agreement terms, rent

cases.name: owner_tenant_comparison_chat
cases.prompt: Difference between tenant rights and owner rights
cases.reply_preview:
This falls under property or tenancy issue.
In broad terms, tenant-side issues usually concern possession, peaceful use, notice, deposit handling, and protection from arbitrary eviction. Owner-side issues usually concern title, rent recovery, damage claims, and lawful recovery of possession.
Relevant context: Tenant-si

cases.name: salary_chat
cases.prompt: What is the general law around unpaid salary?
cases.reply_preview:
The legal category here is employment dispute.
In practice, this usually turns on proof of employment, actual work performed, the pay or benefit trail, and employer communication.
Relevant context: Unpaid salary disputes depend on appointment records, attendance proof, payslip gaps, payment mode, and demand communicati

cases.name: non_legal_redirect
cases.prompt: Tell me a joke about cricket.
cases.reply_preview: I focus on Indian legal information. If you describe the issue in legal terms, I can explain the likely legal category and general context. You can ask things like: 'What type of legal issue is this?', 'What is the general legal context?', or 'What documents should I gather?'
